mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.real_name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.real_name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.id = #{postId}

SELECT p.*, u.real_name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, u.real_name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
